compiled_state.title: Add version.file_path and stack to onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Extend onboarding SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b config template to include version.file_path and stack.

### Changes
1. Add version.file_path to config template, populated from project-detect.sh version_files output
2. When version_files contains 2+ paths, add numbered selection dialogue; write only selected repo-root-relative path
3. When version_files is empty/absent, omit with explanatory comment
4. Add stack key populated from detect-stack.sh output
5. Update config keys table to include version.file_path and stack

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md references version.file_path
  Verify: grep -q "version.file_path" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references version_files from project-detect.sh
  Verify: grep -q "version_files" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains numbered selection for multi-value version_files
  Verify: grep -qi "numbered.*selection\|selection.*version" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
